(Last Update:Janurary 22, 1998)

Happy New Year

I'm giving up this page now because skool is killing me. i will give it to someone that will keep taking care of it and that is seriuos. im not joking. if youll take care of it please e-mail me with what webpages you have done already.Thanks!

Hey I made a mistake about the petition so please forgive me. It's the bitches a Funimation thats censoring DBZ not Saban. Sorry for the error. Thanks! AIM trunks690 Im on a lot!

Buy, Sell, and Trade your anime stuff on the DBZ Marketplace. You could find something you want,cards, toys, videos, games, ANYTHING Anime related! So quit wasting time check it out for yourself! Marketplace here


Please Join my Webring below!


Have you ever seen Vegeta get his ass whooped on the American series of Dragonball Z and notice there isn't enough blood there! Well it's not there because Funimation or whoever is hosting it edits it so there is no blood or nudity. It doesn't even look real. If it's not realistic it will become a show like Barney. We dont want Freeza to tell Gokou "I love you lets be friends and look for the Dragonballs together" We want them to say "I'll kick your sorry ass Freeza and make sure blood is gushing ut of the cut I made with my Kamehameha". So let's save Dragonball. So click the pic on the left and it will transfer you to the petition. Please help stop the censoring on DBZ. We have a lot of people joining and we need more... spread the news!

Check out the Boo series when Gokou turned SSJ3! for the first time, click on the animated gif and it will take you there!


Vote For Me! Click Above!
